title: Evolution Strategies
summary: A type of optimization algorithm inspired by evolutionary principles. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Evolutionary Algorithms. Compare it with Optimizer Scheduling Strategies and Differential Evolution Algorithms. It opens into Evolution Strategies RL and Evolution Strategies (ES).
